subject: Urgent: verify your account password
body_text: Your mailbox will be disabled today. Verify your account password immediately at the link below to avoid losing access.
rationale: Credential phishing with urgency and suspicious login domain.

subject: Payroll deposit failed
body_text: Your payroll deposit failed because your bank details are incomplete. Open the secure form and update your account information within two hours.
rationale: Requests sensitive banking information under time pressure.

subject: Shared document requires sign in
body_text: A confidential document has been shared with you. Sign in with your school account to view it before the access window closes.

subject: Past due invoice requires wire transfer
body_text: Please process the attached invoice today. Our bank account changed, so send the wire transfer to the new account listed in the attachment.
rationale: Business email compromise pattern and macro-enabled attachment.

subject: Unusual login detected
body_text: We detected an unusual login from a new device. Confirm your identity by entering your password and one-time code on the verification page.

subject: Package delivery failed
body_text: Your package could not be delivered. Pay a small redelivery fee now or the parcel will be returned to sender.
rationale: Payment phishing with fake delivery pressure.

subject: Scholarship award confirmation needed
body_text: You have been selected for a scholarship payment. Send your student ID, date of birth, and bank account details to claim the award.
rationale: Sensitive data request and macro-enabled spreadsheet.

subject: Confidential task
body_text: I am in a meeting and need you to buy gift cards for an urgent client request. Reply with the card codes when finished.
rationale: Executive impersonation and gift card scam.

subject: VPN certificate expired
body_text: Your VPN certificate expired. Download the attached installer and run it to restore remote access.
rationale: Executable attachment disguised as security update.

subject: Tax refund pending approval
body_text: A tax refund is pending. Confirm your identity and card number on the refund portal to receive the payment today.
rationale: Financial phishing and card data request.

subject: Storage quota exceeded
body_text: Your storage quota is exceeded. Log in through this page to prevent file deletion. Failure to act today will lock your account.
rationale: Account lock pressure and suspicious login domain.

subject: Remote assistant job offer
body_text: You are approved for a remote assistant role. Deposit the attached check and send part of the funds to our equipment vendor.

subject: Invoice payment account changed
body_text: Please update our payment account before sending today's invoice payment. The new bank details are in the attached document.

subject: Single sign-on session expired
body_text: Your single sign-on session expired. Log in within 30 minutes to keep access to email and course materials.

subject: Password reset required immediately
body_text: Your password is scheduled to expire today. Confirm your current password on the reset page to avoid account suspension.

subject: Research award payment pending
body_text: Your research award payment is pending. Submit your passport number and bank account information to release the funds.

subject: Scanned document from office copier
body_text: A scanned document is attached. Enable editing and macros to view the full content.

subject: VPN login blocked
body_text: Your VPN login was blocked due to certificate errors. Install the attached certificate updater to restore access.

subject: Student refund available
body_text: A student refund is available. Enter your card number and security code on the refund portal to receive it today.

subject: Urgent confidential purchase
body_text: I need you to purchase gift cards for a visiting speaker before the meeting starts. Send the codes by reply.

subject: File deletion warning
body_text: Your drive quota is full. Sign in through the verification page to prevent automatic deletion of shared files.

subject: Customs fee required for delivery
body_text: Your package is waiting at customs. Pay the handling fee within two hours or delivery will be cancelled.

subject: Immediate remote job approval
body_text: You have been selected for a remote job. Deposit the onboarding check and transfer part of the funds to buy equipment.

subject: Grade appeal document
body_text: A grade appeal document is attached. Open the file and enable content to view the instructor comments.

subject: Card transaction blocked
body_text: A card transaction was blocked. Confirm your card number and one-time code to restore access.

subject: Travel reimbursement form
body_text: Your conference reimbursement is pending. Submit banking details and a copy of your ID through the form.

subject: Meeting plugin update required
body_text: Your meeting plugin is out of date. Download and run the attached updater before joining today's call.

subject: Mailbox quota exceeded
body_text: Your mailbox quota has been exceeded. Verify your mailbox password to keep receiving new messages.

subject: Same-day supplier payment
body_text: Please send a same-day transfer to the supplier account below. Do not wait for the regular approval process.

subject: Critical security patch
body_text: A critical security patch is attached. Run the patch immediately to prevent account lockout.
